content: (The location is now Nilheim.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): bandit, Lydia, Daegon, bandit, bandit) (MJR: Hello; Telrav: Are they gone? MJR: Are you okay?; Telrav: Bandits attacked and ransacked my cart. Can you help me? MJR: What can I do?; Telrav: My camp is nearby in the ruins of Nilheim. Get me there safely and you'll be rewarded.)

Telrav: The rain's making everything slick and miserable out here. Please, if we hurry to the ruins, I can pay you all handsomely—gold, supplies, whatever you need. Jenassa: This storm soaks through leather like a sieve. If there's gold at the end, I'll cut down anything that tries to stop us on the way. Lead on, stranger.
Telrav: Finally safe in the ruins—Dibella's grace, that rain nearly drowned us out there.

Jenassa: What in Oblivion is this? That woman's sprawled like fresh kill—blood everywhere, her green rags torn open. If this is your idea of a safe camp, stranger, you've got explaining to do. Telrav: By the Divines, no— that's not part of the plan! Bandits must've hit here too. Stay sharp; my gold's still yours if we sort this mess. The ruins hide worse than corpses in the night.
Jenassa: She's out cold—looks like she's been roughed up bad. That skimpy getup's no match for Skyrim's chill or whatever ambushed her. You know her, Telrav? safe

Jenassa: Filthy cur—your blade's poison stings like a skeever's bite, but I'll ram this iron through your gut before you draw breath again! Telrav: Ha, the fox is in the henhouse now! Draw steel, Jenassa—let's paint these ruins red at dawn!

Jenassa: That's the last of them—sprawled like the trash they are. Dawn's breaking over these cursed ruins, and the air reeks of blood and wet stone. Telrav: Aye, spilled enough red to honor Dibella's wrath. But that blonde wench on the leaves—she's still out, gaze her wounds and let's claim what's ours in this misty haze.

(*You are observing the following:* The scene depicts a dimly lit, ancient stone passageway viewed from a low angle, as if standing at the base of a descending staircase. Rough-hewn walls of weathered brown rock dominate the view, textured with irregular cracks, mossy patches, and uneven protrusions that suggest years of natural erosion or manual carving. The walls curve slightly inward, creating a narrow, oppressive corridor that fades into deep shadows ahead. A set of sturdy stone steps leads downward into the darkness, their surfaces worn smooth in places and dusted with faint debris. The stairs appear to spiral or turn gently to the right, following the contour of the enclosing walls. The lighting is sparse and ambient, casting subtle warm glows and long shadows that emphasize the depth and isolation of the space—no visible light sources are apparent, implying illumination from a torch or unseen lantern just out of frame. At the periphery, a subtle overlay of graphical elements hovers at the bottom, including small icons resembling a digital clock, battery indicator, network status, and notification badges, alongside minimized windows for various applications, evoking a modern interface superimposed on the archaic surroundings.) (Jenassa is no longer in combat.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): bandit, Daegon, Lydia, rabbit, Fox) (bandit hit Jenassa with Steel Mace) (MJR fired an arrow.) (MJR unequipped Daedric Arrow) (MJR dropped/gave Daedric Arrow) (MJR equipped Daedric Arrow) (MJR cast the spell / consumed Unrelenting Force - Fus) (MJR hit Jenassa with Unrelenting Force - Fus) (Jenassa has entered combat with bandit) (bandit was killed by the group) (Jenassa is no longer in combat) (Jenassa is searching for bandit)
